concerns.text: FR-001 states 'download ≥10 open-source Java projects' but does not explicitly include the ≥10,000 code units requirement that appears in US-1 acceptance scenario 1. This creates a gap between the FR and its acceptance criteria.

Terminology inconsistency: 'code units' (FR-002, Key Entities) vs 'files or functions' (US-1 acceptance scenario 1). The Key Entities section defines CodeUnit as 'a file or function' but FR-002 does not clarify which granularity metrics are computed at.

Ambiguous phrasing: 'impute or remove rows with missing values in <5% of the dataset' could mean either (a) dataset has <5% missing values overall, or (b) rows with missing values constitute <5% of rows. US-1 acceptance scenario 2 clarifies as '<5% of rows' but FR-003 should match this language.
